author: mruberry
text: This failure is in upstream. It looks like the test is skipped by the CI because the test requires torchvision, and torchvision is not installed when this test would be run.

author: apaszke
text: Yeah the new diff looks ok. We should get torchvision installed in our CI, or remove this test entirely (since tracing of alexnet it's tested in the ONNX codepaths anyway). Wdyt [@ezyang](https://github.com/ezyang)?

author: ezyang
text: There are some other tests in the test suite which depend on torchvision being installed. It seems reasonable enough to make sure it is preinstalled before any tests run. Should be an easy patch (if everything is actually working, which it might not be!)

author: ezyang
text: Install torchvision before all tests, tickles [pytorch#7851](https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/7851)

author: facebook-github-bot
text: Install torchvision before all tests, tickles [#7851](https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/7851) ([#8311](https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/8311))
